name: grep-search
description: Search for one or more patterns in files or directories with line numbers, context, file-type, case-insensitive, exclusion options, and depth limiting, with --cd to change directory before searching.

parameters.name: --cd=DIR, -C DIR
parameters.description: Change to directory before searching (replaces cd + grep pattern)

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Search pattern(s) (grep-compatible regex); multiple patterns return union of matches

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: File path or directory to search

parameters.name: --max-count=N
parameters.description: Stop after N matching lines per file

parameters.name: -C, --context=N
parameters.description: Show N lines of context around matches

parameters.name: --files-only, -l
parameters.description: List only filenames with matches, not matching lines

parameters.name: -d, --max-depth=N
parameters.description: Max directory depth for recursive search

examples.expected: Files and line numbers matching FindOptions case-insensitively

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses find+xargs+grep piping and multiple grep calls into one step, reducing tool call characters and step count; --cd replaces cd + grep two-step pattern.
